provenance.model: Not reported by the built-in tool
provenance.prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: game website hero illustration, 16:9 landscape
Primary request: Create an original, dreamy night-sky scene for a gentle child-friendly motion game about catching twinkling morning stars. Warm golden stars drift along calm, reachable curved paths above softly layered periwinkle cloud islands.
Scene/backdrop: Deep navy night sky with sparse constellation dots, subtle painterly grain, and a quiet horizon glow.
Subject: Three prominent five-point stars with clear, friendly silhouettes and a few much smaller supporting sparkles; no characters or people.
Style/medium: Premium editorial children's-book illustration, layered cut-paper and soft gouache texture, crisp silhouettes, refined rather than babyish.
Composition/framing: Exact 16:9 horizontal composition; generous open space; primary glowing star cluster slightly right of center; strong readable shapes that remain clear at website hero size.
Lighting/mood: Calm, wondrous, reassuring; warm starlight with restrained halos.
Color palette: Accessible deep navy, luminous periwinkle, warm cream and soft gold starlight.
Text: none.
Constraints: Original artwork; no text, letters, numbers, logos, trademarks, watermark, recognizable copyrighted characters, public figures, photorealistic children, deceptive UI, or unsafe movement cues.
Avoid: Neon saturation, frightening darkness, dense clutter, gradients that wash out contrast, childish clip-art styling.
